content.full_text:
March 28, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
ATTN: Carla Wardlow
428 J Street, 6th Floor
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Carla:

This letter is sent to confirm our telephone conversation. As you know, we represent Patricia Garamendi, who is a candidate in the special run-off election in the 26th Assembly District. The run-off election is scheduled for May 14, 1991.

You confirmed that only one pre-election report is required in connection with this election. This report is due 12 days before the election and covers the period ending 17 days before the election. Your advice is based on Government Code section 84200.8(c).

Thank you for your time and attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

OLSON, CONNELLY, HAGEL, FONG & LEIDIGH

DIANE M. FISHBURN

LANCE H. OLSON
BRUCE J. HAGEL
LERoy Y. FONG
ROBERT E. LEIDIGH
GEORGE M. WATERS
DIANE M. FISHBURN
CHRISTIAN A. SPECK

DMF:deh

cc: Patricia Garamendi
